questions.question: A production planner notices that raw material stock is insufficient to meet today's production schedule. Which department should be contacted first?

Before starting maintenance work on electrical equipment, what should be the first priority?
options: Follow safety procedures and isolate the equipment
questions.correct_answer: Follow safety procedures and isolate the equipment

options: Predict equipment failures before they occur
questions.correct_answer: Predict equipment failures before they occur
